query_normalized: predicting the impact of surface treatments on the adhesion strength of polymers materials science
rationale: This paper should be included in the literature review because it measures the same core mechanism (surface treatment → adhesion/bonding strength) in the same domain (polymer materials science), satisfying criteria (a) and (b). While it focuses on metal-polymer hybrid structures rather than pure polymers, it directly addresses the fundamental relationship between surface treatments and adhesion strength that the user's research question investigates.
